description: create/update the repo-root .agents/plugins/marketplace.json entry for a plugin (destructive)
rules: destructive — mutates the shared marketplace.json registry that gates Codex UI availability/ordering
appends a new plugins[] entry, or overwrites the same-named entry only with --force
source.path is kept relative as ./plugins/<plugin-name>; existing interface.displayName is preserved
usage: Set PLUGIN_NAME. Optionally set PLUGIN_PARENT (plugin dir parent) and MARKETPLACE_PATH (defaults under record_store). Output: marketplace.json (the updated registry copy/report).
limitation: Destructive: edits a shared registry file. Without --force, a pre-existing entry for the same plugin name aborts the update. Default policy/category values unless overridden.
